slides.title: The easiest pace might *add the most years*.
slides.sub: Zone 2 is gentle, conversational effort. It quietly builds the engine that carries you through life.

slides.title: What zone 2 really is
slides.body: It is easy, steady movement where you can *still hold a conversation*. Comfortable, never breathless.

slides.title: Build your aerobic base
slides.body: Easy effort grows the engine that powers your whole day. A strong base is linked to a longer life.

slides.title: How much, how often
slides.body: Aim for two to three easy sessions a week, around thirty minutes. A *brisk walk counts*.

slides.title: Gentle and sustainable
slides.body: Because it is easy, you can do it often without burning out. Your body recovers fast.

slides.title: Consistency compounds
slides.body: Small easy efforts stack up over months and years. The base you build *quietly protects* your future.

slides.title: Build the base that *lasts*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your movement and steps and turns every easy walk into one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The pace that helps you live longer is easier than you think. 🌿

Zone 2 is gentle, talk-test movement that builds your aerobic base. Two or three easy sessions a week, and consistency does the rest. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your everyday movement into one daily score → link in bio.
